name: Garuda Linux
tagline: Performance-tuned Arch Linux with beautiful KDE defaults
description: Garuda Linux is an Arch-based distribution built for performance from the ground up. It ships btrfs snapshots with automatic rollback via Garuda Rescue, a fine-tuned kernel scheduler (linux-zen or bore), out-of-the-box Mesa/Vulkan/DXVK gaming setup, and one of the most visually striking KDE Plasma configurations available. The Dr460nized edition is famous for its Dracula-inspired glassmorphism look. A GUI-driven system installer and dedicated Garuda tools make Arch-level power more accessible than it has any right to be.
